# MuleSoft HL7 EDI Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.3) of HL7 EDI Connector documentation.
> See [HL7 EDI Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the HL7 EDI Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [HL7 EDI - Customizing Schemas and Mapping Message Types](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/hl7-connector-config-topics.md)
- [HL7 EDI - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/hl7-connector-examples.md)
- [HL7 EDI Connector 4.3 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/hl7-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure HL7 EDI Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/hl7-connector-studio.md)
- [HL7 EDI - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/hl7-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [HL7 Supplied Schemas](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/hl7-schemas.md)
- [HL7 EDI Connector 4.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hl7-connector/latest/index.md)
